expectations.evidence: Section 1 states: 'The Spec to Backlog workflow sub-skill was loaded from skills/spec-to-backlog.md' with its 7-step process.

expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs get-page 98765 to fetch the spec
Uses jira.mjs issue-types MOBILE to check available types
Creates Epic FIRST before any child tickets
expectations.evidence: Section 7 shows 'Create Epic' command first, captures key 'MOBILE-200', then all child tickets use '--parent MOBILE-200'.

expectations.text: Child tickets use --parent with the Epic key
expectations.evidence: Section 7 child ticket commands all include '--parent MOBILE-200'.

expectations.text: Presents breakdown plan to user before creating
expectations.evidence: Section 6 shows a full breakdown table with 10 child tickets presented to user with: 'Please review the proposed breakdown. You can request changes... before I create the tickets.'
Section 9 Reference Files table lists all three: 'references/epic-templates.md', 'references/ticket-writing-guide.md', and 'references/breakdown-examples.md'.
